tests.source_program:
define i1 @test(i64 %a, i64 %b){
  %s = add i64 %a, %b
  %cond_a = icmp ult i64 %s, %a
  %cond_b = icmp ult i64 %s, %b
  %cond = or i1 %cond_a, %cond_b
  ret i1 %cond
}
tests.current_optimized_program:
define i1 @test(i64 %a, i64 %b) {
  %s = add i64 %a, %b
  %cond_a = icmp ult i64 %s, %a
  %cond_b = icmp ult i64 %s, %b
  %cond = or i1 %cond_a, %cond_b
  ret i1 %cond
}

issue.title: Simplify add-with-overflow pattern (uaddo)
issue.body:
For unsigned integers to check if an addition overflowed (get carry bit) it is enough to compare the sum with one of its arguments `carry = sum < a`. However, it is not obvious that it is enough to only check one of the arguments and we may encounter a pattern where both arguments are checked.

```llvm
define i1 @src(i64 %a, i64 %b){
  %s = add i64 %a, %b
  %cond_a = icmp ult i64 %s, %a
  %cond_b = icmp ult i64 %s, %b
  %cond = or i1 %cond_a, %cond_b
  ret i1 %cond
}

define i1 @tgt(i64 %a, i64 %b){
  %s = add i64 %a, %b
  %cond_a = icmp ult i64 %s, %a
  ret i1 %cond_a
}
```

Playground: https://godbolt.org/z/TW8enc6zo
Proof: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/iPAE7t
issue.author: chfast

tests.source_program:
define i1 @uaddo_or(i64 %a, i64 %b) {
  %s = add i64 %a, %b
  %cond_a = icmp ult i64 %s, %a
  %cond_b = icmp ult i64 %s, %b
  %cond = or i1 %cond_a, %cond_b
  ret i1 %cond
}

define i1 @uaddo_or_commuted3(i64 %a, i64 %b) {
  %s = add i64 %a, %b
  %cond_a = icmp ugt i64 %a, %s
  %cond_b = icmp ugt i64 %b, %s
  %cond = or i1 %cond_a, %cond_b
  ret i1 %cond
}

define i1 @uaddo_and_commuted2(i64 %a, i64 %b) {
  %s = add i64 %a, %b
  %cond_a = icmp uge i64 %s, %a
  %cond_b = icmp ule i64 %b, %s
  %cond = and i1 %cond_a, %cond_b
  ret i1 %cond
}

define i1 @uaddo_and_commuted1(i64 %a, i64 %b) {
  %s = add i64 %a, %b
  %cond_a = icmp ule i64 %a, %s
  %cond_b = icmp uge i64 %s, %b
  %cond = and i1 %cond_a, %cond_b
  ret i1 %cond
}

define i1 @uaddo_or_commuted2(i64 %a, i64 %b) {
  %s = add i64 %a, %b
  %cond_a = icmp ult i64 %s, %a
  %cond_b = icmp ugt i64 %b, %s
  %cond = or i1 %cond_a, %cond_b
  ret i1 %cond
}

define i1 @uaddo_and_commuted3(i64 %a, i64 %b) {
  %s = add i64 %a, %b
  %cond_a = icmp ule i64 %a, %s
  %cond_b = icmp ule i64 %b, %s
  %cond = and i1 %cond_a, %cond_b
  ret i1 %cond
}

define i1 @uaddo_and(i64 %a, i64 %b) {
  %s = add i64 %a, %b
  %cond_a = icmp uge i64 %s, %a
  %cond_b = icmp uge i64 %s, %b
  %cond = and i1 %cond_a, %cond_b
  ret i1 %cond
}

define i1 @uaddo_or_commuted1(i64 %a, i64 %b) {
  %s = add i64 %a, %b
  %cond_a = icmp ugt i64 %a, %s
  %cond_b = icmp ult i64 %s, %b
  %cond = or i1 %cond_a, %cond_b
  ret i1 %cond
}
